name: e2e-playwright
description: Permet d'exécuter des tests de bout en bout sur la plateforme Pix
author: GIP Pix

scripts.test:snapshot: npm run test:base && UPDATE_SNAPSHOTS=true playwright test --grep @snapshot
scripts.test:prescription: npm run test:base && playwright test --config playwright.config.prescription.ts
scripts.test:prescription:ui: npm run test:base && playwright test --config playwright.config.prescription.ts --ui
scripts.test:certif: npm run test:base && playwright test --config playwright.config.certif.ts
scripts.test:certif:snapshot: npm run test:base && UPDATE_SNAPSHOTS=true playwright test --config playwright.config.certif.ts --grep @snapshot
scripts.test:certif:ui: npm run test:base && playwright test --config playwright.config.certif.ts --ui
scripts.test:certif:snapshot:ui: npm run test:base && UPDATE_SNAPSHOTS=true playwright test --config playwright.config.certif.ts --ui
